revision.comment: remove [[WP:CAT|category link]] already on /doc page + per edit request on talk page - update entries
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Falkland Islands | flag alias = Flag of the Falkland Islands.svg | flag alias-1876 = Flag of the Falkland Islands (1876–1925).svg | flag alias-1925 = Flag of the Falkland Islands (1925–1948).svg | flag alias-1948 = Flag of the Falkland Islands (1948–1999).svg | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of the Falkland Islands.svg | flag alias-civil-1948 = Civil Ensign of the Falkland Islands (1999).svg | flag alias-governor = Flag of the Governor of the Falkland Islands.svg | flag alias-governor-1948 = Flag of the Governor of the Falkland Islands (1948–1999).svg | link alias-cricket = Falkland Islands cricket team | link alias-football = Falkland Islands official football team | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1876 | var2 = 1925 | var3 = 1948 | var4 = civil | var5 = civil-1948 | var6 = governor | var7 = governor-1948 | redir1 = FLK </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Falkland_Islands here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Falkland_Islands for full history.
